defaultCourses.title: ICS 314 - Software Engineering
defaultCourses.description: Introduction to software engineering principles, web application development, design patterns, and software project practices.

objectives.description: Apply software design patterns to organize and improve application code.
Analyze tradeoffs between different web application architecture choices.

defaultCourses.title: ICS 311 - Algorithms
defaultCourses.description: Study of algorithm design, correctness, runtime analysis, graphs, dynamic programming, and complexity.

objectives.description: Apply dynamic programming techniques to solve optimization problems.
Evaluate shortest path algorithms and explain when each one should be used.

defaultCourses.title: ICS 111 - Introduction to Computer Science
defaultCourses.description: An introductory programming course focused on problem solving, control flow, functions, and basic data structures.

objectives.description: Use variables, conditionals, and loops to solve basic programming problems.
Break a programming problem into smaller reusable functions.

defaultCourses.title: SRCH 101 - Teaching with SRCH
defaultCourses.description: A sample administrator course showing how SRCH resources can be connected to course objectives.

objectives.description: Identify SRCH resources that support a course learning objective.
Create a curriculum map that connects objectives, resources, and instructor notes.
